overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban street at night, entering a club with red lighting, then visiting a shop with chrome robot displays. The scene features wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon signs in a dense cyberpunk city environment.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered cyberpunk alleyway lined with vibrant neon signs for adult shops. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as the character approaches a club entrance marked by a green neon sign.

character exits the club back to the neon-lit street

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit club, red neon lights dominate the atmosphere. A large heart-shaped neon sign glows above red couches where patrons relax. The character moves through the intimate space and exits back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with adult toy shopfronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the street toward a shop displaying chrome robots in the window

segments.scene_description: Back on the wet street, the character walks past the same neon signs now viewed from the opposite direction. The camera approaches a shop entrance displaying chrome robots in the window while pedestrians stand nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult entertainment shop with chrome robot displays and neon lighting

exits the shop back to the street

red neon signs with XXX and 18+ indicating adult content
service counter with merchandise displays behind glass

segments.scene_description: Inside the shop, chrome humanoid robots stand on display under colorful neon lighting. The character moves through the space examining the merchandise before heading back toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with multiple pedestrians and towering buildings

events.description: exits the robot shop and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street past various pedestrians in a bustling neon-lit district

entered.detail: holographic projection of a woman in blue dress advertising products
tall multi-story buildings with various neon signage and windows
tall street lamps illuminating the road surface

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shop, the character returns to the bustling city street. A holographic advertisement flickers on the left while pedestrians walk through the wet streets reflecting the neon lights of the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban district, transitioning from a narrow alleyway into intimate interior spaces before returning to the bustling city street. It begins by following a character through a covered alley where wet pavement reflects vibrant adult shop signs, moving steadily toward a club marked by a green neon glow. As the character enters the club, the atmosphere shifts to a dimly lit red interior dominated by a glowing heart-shaped sign and plush couches, before the camera follows them back out into the rain-slicked street. The scene then shifts toward a shop window featuring chrome robots, gliding inside to examine the humanoid displays under colorful lighting before exiting once more. Finally, the camera moves back into the open city air, passing a flickering holographic advertisement and pedestrians amidst the shimmering reflections of the surrounding skyscrapers.
